# David McGlennon Coaching

> Executive, leadership and career coaching for individuals, leaders and teams across London and the South of England, and online. Delivered by David McGlennon, a Chartered FCIPD and former FTSE 250 HR Director with more than 30 years of experience.

## About David
- Career spanning the shop floor to HR Director and Executive Committee level in a FTSE 250 business.
- Chartered FCIPD, ILM-qualified coach, accredited Insights Discovery Practitioner, Belbin Team Role Facilitator and Leadership Trainer.
- Brings experience from both sides of the table: supporting individuals, and sitting where decisions on promotion, succession and restructuring are made.

## Who it is for
- Career professionals: career change, job search, promotion readiness, return to work, confidence.
- Leaders, managers and teams: leadership development, executive coaching, managing change, team performance.

## Services and rates
- Career Coaching: 80 GBP per hour (discounts for new graduates).
- Executive and Leadership Coaching: 100 GBP per hour.
- Delivered online from anywhere, or in person across London and the South of England.

## Contact
- Website: https://davidmcglennon.co.uk/
- Enquiries: via the contact form at https://davidmcglennon.co.uk/#contact
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/david-mcglennon-0097228/
